/**
 * HoneLandingPages functions and definitions
 */

// Theme setup
function hone_landing_theme_setup() {
    // Add theme support for title tag
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    
    // Add theme support for post thumbnails
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'hone_landing_theme_setup');

// Disable Sitemaps
add_filter( 'wp_sitemaps_enabled', '__return_false' );

content.text:
Now I have everything I need. Here's the plan:

---

## Implementation Plan: Per-Template CDN Toggle

### Core Insight

Every template already calls `$theme_folder = get_bloginfo('stylesheet_directory')`. WordPress exposes a `stylesheet_directory_uri` filter that intercepts that call. We can rewrite the domain to the CDN URL **inside that filter** — meaning **most templates need zero changes**.

---

### Step 1 — `functions.php` (only file with real logic)

Add a filter that reads a global `$use_cdn` flag and swaps the domain to the RocketCDN CNAME when available:

```php
/**
 * CDN URL rewrite filter.
 * Replaces the theme asset base URL with the RocketCDN domain.
 * Set $use_cdn = false in a template before get_header() to bypass.
 */
add_filter('stylesheet_directory_uri', function($uri) {
    global $use_cdn;

    if (isset($use_cdn) && $use_cdn === false) {
        return $uri; // Explicitly disabled for this template
    }

    if (function_exists('get_rocket_option')) {
        $cname = get_rocket_option('cdn_cname');
        if ($cname) {
            return preg_replace('/^https?:\/\/[^\/]+/', 'https://' . $cname, $uri);
        }
    }

    return $uri; // Fallback: WP Rocket not active or no CNAME configured
});
```

This covers:
- All `$theme_folder = get_bloginfo('stylesheet_directory')` calls in every template
- The same call inside `header.php` (favicon, font preload links)

---

### Step 2 — Outlier templates (one line each)

Only the templates served via URL rewrites need to opt out. From `functions.php` lines 180–182, those are:

| Template file | Rewrite rule |
|---|---|
| `page-overview-3.php` | `^overview/3/?$` |
| `page-overview-tiktok.php` | `^overview/3/rww/tiktok/?$` |

Add **one line** to each, before the existing `$theme_folder` assignment:

```php
$use_cdn = false; // CDN disabled — page served via URL rewrite
$theme_folder = get_bloginfo('stylesheet_directory');
```

---

### What changes in total

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `functions.php` | +~15 lines (the filter) |
| `page-overview-3.php` | +1 line |
| `page-overview-tiktok.php` | +1 line |
| All other 42 templates | **No changes** |

---

### How it behaves

- **CDN active, normal template**: filter fires, domain becomes `https://{cdn-cname}`, all `$theme_folder`-prefixed image/asset paths go through CDN
- **CDN active, outlier template**: `$use_cdn = false` set before `get_bloginfo()`, filter sees it and returns the original URL — no CDN
- **WP Rocket not active / no CNAME set**: filter returns original URL unchanged — graceful fallback, nothing breaks

<?php
/**
 * HoneLandingPages functions and definitions
 */

// Theme setup
function hone_landing_theme_setup() {
    // Add theme support for title tag
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    
    // Add theme support for post thumbnails
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'hone_landing_theme_setup');

// Disable Sitemaps
add_filter( 'wp_sitemaps_enabled', '__return_false' );

/**
 * List of templates that have page-specific CSS files
 * Template names match both $class_names[] in page templates and compiled CSS filenames
 */
define('HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES', [
    'article-hrt-overview',
    'article-trt',
    'article-trt-new-copy',
    'article-trt-old-design-new-copy',
    'article-trt-pmax',
    'basic-membership',
    'basic-membership-v2',
    'mens-hrt-aol',
    'mens-hrt-aol-forbes',
    'mens-hrt-big-swing',
    'mens-hrt-cc-buybox',
    'mens-hrt-cc-why-seek',
    'mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1',
    'mens-multiquiz',
    'mens-opt-comparison',
    'mens-opt-comparison-forbes',
    'mens-opt-comparison-forbes-hero',
    'mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz',
    'mens-opt-enhanced-pdp',
    'mens-opt-forbes',
    'mens-opt-tiktok',
    'mens-opt-tiktok-pricing',
    'mens-trt-forbes',
    'overview-3',
    'overview-hormone-optimization',
    'overview-hormone-optimization-monitor-2',
    'overview-hormone-optimization-pricing',
    'overview-light-rebrand',
    'overview-mhrt-affiliate',
    'overview-multiquiz',
    'overview-pricing',
    'overview-pricing-variant-a',
    'overview-pricing-variant-b',
    'overview-tiktok',
    'overview-tiktok-pricing',
    'run-club',
    'success',
    'womens-hormone-imbalance',
    'womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax',
    'womens-hormone-imbalance-tt',
    'womens-menopause',
    'womens-menopause-tt',
    'womens-opt-light-touch',
    'womens-second-funnel',
]);

// Enqueue styles and scripts
function hone_landing_enqueue_assets() {
    global $class_names;

    $theme_version = wp_get_theme()->get('Version');
    $theme_uri = get_template_directory_uri();

    // Always load main.min.css - contains all common styles (reset, settings, parts)
    wp_enqueue_style(
        'hone-main-style',
        $theme_uri . '/static/css/main.min.css',
        array(),
        $theme_version
    );

    // Early return if no class_names set
    if (empty($class_names) || !is_array($class_names)) {
        return;
    }

    // Check if this template has page-specific styles
    $matches = array_intersect($class_names, HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES);

    // Load all matching page-specific styles in order
    // This allows for layered styles (e.g., base 'mens-hrt-aol' + specific 'mens-hrt-aol-forbes')
    if (!empty($matches)) {
        $dependencies = array('hone-main-style'); // First match depends on main styles
        
        foreach ($matches as $matched_class) {
            $css_file = get_template_directory() . '/static/css/pages/' . $matched_class . '.css';
            if (file_exists($css_file)) {
                wp_enqueue_style(
                    'hone-page-' . $matched_class,
                    $theme_uri . '/static/css/pages/' . $matched_class . '.css',
                    $dependencies,
                    $theme_version,
                    'all'
                );
                // Make next stylesheet depend on this one to maintain load order
                $dependencies = array('hone-page-' . $matched_class);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Enqueue main JavaScript (always loaded - contains trackQuizEvent)
    wp_enqueue_script(
        'hone-main-script',
        $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/combined.js',
        array(),
        $theme_version,
        true
    );
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'hone_landing_enqueue_assets');

/**
 * Register page-specific JavaScript bundles
 * 
 * These bundles are built with esbuild and include all dependencies
 * (except jQuery which is loaded via WordPress).
 * 
 * Each bundle includes: Slick carousel + relevant utilities
 * 
 * Usage in templates:
 *   wp_enqueue_script('hone-page-article-trt-new-copy');
 */
function hone_register_bundles() {
    $theme_version = wp_get_theme()->get('Version');
    $theme_uri = get_template_directory_uri();
    $theme_dir = get_template_directory();
    
    // Register jQuery Migrate (dependency for Slick)
    wp_register_script(
        'jquery-migrate',
        $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/jquery-migrate-1.2.1.min.js',
        array('jquery'),
        '1.2.1',
        true
    );
    
    // Register Slick carousel
    wp_register_script(
        'slick-carousel',
        $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/slick.min.js',
        array('jquery', 'jquery-migrate'),
        '1.8.1',
        true
    );
    
    // Register each page bundle with jQuery, jQuery Migrate, and Slick as dependencies
    foreach (HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES as $page) {
        $bundle_path = $theme_dir . '/static/js/dist/pages/' . $page . '.bundle.min.js';
        $bundle_url = $theme_uri . '/static/js/dist/pages/' . $page . '.bundle.min.js';
        if (file_exists($bundle_path)) {
            wp_register_script(
                'hone-page-' . $page,
                $bundle_url,
                array('jquery', 'jquery-migrate', 'slick-carousel'),
                $theme_version,
                true
            );
        }
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'hone_register_bundles', 5);

// the current LPs had funky urls and we need to match them exactly so that the ads don't get reset
// The pages in wp-admin need to be set with these specific slugs and cannot have a parent page.
remove_filter('template_redirect', 'redirect_canonical');
add_action('init', function() {
    add_rewrite_rule('^overview/3/?$', 'index.php?pagename=overview-3', 'top');
    add_rewrite_rule('^overview/3/hormone-optimization/?$', 'index.php?pagename=overview-3-hormone-optimization', 'top');    
    add_rewrite_rule('^overview/3/rww/tiktok/?$', 'index.php?pagename=overview-tiktok', 'top');        
});

add_filter('query_vars', function($vars) {
    $vars[] = 'pagename';
    return $vars;
});

function get_query_string(){
    $query_params = [];
    foreach ($_GET as $key => $value) {
        $query_params[$key] = sanitize_text_field($value);
    }
    return http_build_query($query_params);
}

lines: + * Replaces the theme asset base URL with the RocketCDN domain when available.
+ * Set $use_cdn = false in a template before get_header() to bypass CDN for that page.

// The pages in wp-admin need to be set with these specific slugs and cannot have a parent page.

Boost your testosterone and restore energy, strength, and libido

Why seek treatment?

men 30+ will suffer from low testosterone.

17%

less testosterone in the average 30+ man.
*Journal of Clinical Endocrinology & Metabolism

57%

of men have never had their testosterone levels checked.

2 IN 5

men avoided the doctor until their symptoms were urgent.

You’ll Have More Energy

Experience better sleep, increased motivation, and the drive to be more active. With TRT, you’ll notice a boost in energy that makes physical activity easier and more enjoyable, enhancing your overall well-being.

You’ll Build Muscle and Burn Belly Fat Faster

Diet, rest, and exercise are key to your success. However, when your testosterone levels dip below your normal range, your strength strains, your body mass gets mushy, and your once-unbeatable endurance ends. The only thing low testosterone builds up is fat deposits around your midsection, which leaves you to carry a growing problem wherever you go.

You’ll See a BIG Change in Your Love Life

You’ll start to feel the difference as soon as three weeks of treatment. By six weeks, you and your loved one will discover that your “drive” is back to what it once was, if not better.

Your Mental Acuity and Focus Return

Your change in demeanor will support a radically improved self-confidence and clearer mindset, plus an inner strength that’s more ready to go toe-to-toe with whatever life throws your way.

    Hone provides administrative and management services to independently physician-owned and operated medical practices. Each Hone-branded medical practice is owned and operated by a licensed physician. There is no single provider of medical care called “Hone”. Each Hone-branded practice engages a network of United States-based clinicians who provide clinical telehealth services. The clinicians deliver clinical services via the Hone platform to their patients.

    Hone does not provide medical advice or care, own or operate the medical practices, employ or in any way supervise the clinicians providing medical care, and control over the care provided is the sole responsibility of the independent medical practices and the clinicians they employ. Services and practices may vary across clinicians, and patients should contact the clinicians at Broad Health, P.C., directly for all questions concerning their medical care.

    ' ], [ 'question' => "Do physicians review the risks and benefits of any medication?", 'answer' => '

lines: +$use_cdn = false; // CDN disabled — page served via URL rewrite (^overview/3/rww/tiktok/)

content.text:
Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

- **`src/functions.php`** — Added the `stylesheet_directory_uri` filter (~20 lines) alongside the existing URL rewrite block, so the context is clear
- **`src/page-overview-3.php`** — Added `$use_cdn = false;` with a comment explaining why
- **`src/page-overview-tiktok.php`** — Same

One thing to verify with your team: the third rewrite rule (`^overview/3/hormone-optimization/` → `pagename=overview-3-hormone-optimization`) doesn't map to any existing template file I can find. If that page exists in WP and gets created as a template later, it would need the same `$use_cdn = false` treatment.
